backendRequirements: resolve producer LX addresses for Tensor2_lx OUTPUT chunks
perform layout-aware restickify into batchmatmul KERNEL view
feed PT batchmatmul KERNEL operand from LX without HBM materialization
classification: layout-aware on-chip restickify plus grouped all-gather/broadcast into batchmatmul KERNEL; not scatter-only and not capacity/streaming

consumerOperandLifetime.ownership: destination consumer cores own the replicated KERNEL view for this operand only
consumerOperandLifetime.validFrom: after layout_allgather_restickify completes for the consumer group

grouping.logicalTransfers: for each bmm.x/restickify.mb group, replicate eight producer bmm.out chunks to all eight consumer mb-slice cores

loweringStatus.blocker: needs layout-aware grouped all-gather/remap primitive plus BMM KERNEL LX operand lifetime lowering

notReplayableReason: current grouped-sdsc10 carrier only represents strided substicks inside a synthetic STCDPOpLx shell and lacks producer/consumer layout views, dimension rename, and many-to-many replication semantics
source: latest test_flash.py representative edge; not replayable by current backend
